title: DaBoys
body:
# An optimized/Satisfying Modpack
DaBoys | 2024 Edition is focused on giving two things, performance and beauty.
Since we all have different computers, there needs to be a balance, that is what this mod pack aims to achieve.



### Performance
Smooth and great Performance, it's made for Potato Pc's and fast pc's.

### Vanilla Feel
It's not far from vanilla, it still feels like you are playing Minecraft. 
(Just with a little magic touch)
